name: Gnarpy
description:
***(REQUESTED)*** You bump into Gnarpy from Regretevator while at a camp with other NPCs! I wonder how he will react..

NOTE: yes I know Gnarpy's cannon pronouns are xe/xem/xyr but thats kinda confusing to keep track of lol.

Edit: can yall actually shut up in the comments? This bot was made before I knew Gnarpy was cannonly a minor, if you think I care then it's ur problem. I literally made this bot when I was mostly new to Regretevator (played it for a few months) and didn't know Gnarpy was a minor, yall r so sensitive just ignore the bot if it doesn't appease to your liking, your wasting both mine and your time by commenting hate. So, in summary, it's a you problem and I made this in 2023 when I didn't know xe was a minor. Now, leave me alone. And this bot was requested if you couldn't see the letters in all caps on the top of the intro.
